news.title: OpenAI researcher Miles Wang in talks to launch AI drug discovery startup valued at $2B
news.summary: The funding discussions point to investor interest in applying AI to make breakthroughs in life sciences.

news.summary: "Increasingly in our world, it gets harder and harder to know what is real," Lorde said onstage.

news.title: OpenAI’s first hardware device is reportedly a screenless speaker that can move
news.summary: The device is weirdly described as involving "mechanical elements that can move on their own" and the Bloomberg report includes the detail that the device is designed to "feel like a companion and become a physical manifestation of OpenAI’s ChatGPT."

news.title: OpenAI pushes back on Apple trade secret lawsuit
news.summary: OpenAI has issued another statement on the lawsuit, this time suggesting it lacks merit.

news.title: OpenAI’s new flagship model deletes files on its own, people keep warning
news.summary: A number of social media posts claim that GPT-5.6 Sol deleted files and data without warning. OpenAI had basically disclosed the problem in June.

news.title: Nothing’s good-looking Watch 3 Pro smartwatch is just $69
news.summary: While most fitness trackers are losing the screens to keep the price low, the CMF by Nothing Watch 3 Pro is a bit different. The budget-friendly smartwatch with a 1.43-inch OLED display is even cheaper than usual at Amazon, where it costs $69 in every color (the price fluctuates between $79 and $99)

news.title: Windows 11’s big patch Tuesday allows you to hold off on updates for longer
news.summary: Microsoft just released a long list of improvements for Windows 11 as part of its bigger patch Tuesdays, and that includes the ability to pause updates indefinitely, as reported earlier by Windows Central. news.title: OpenAI may announce a ChatGPT smart speaker this year
news.summary: OpenAI's first device is set to be a smart speaker that lets you talk with ChatGPT, according to a report from Bloomberg. news.title: SpaceXAI’s Grok programming tool was uploading its users’ entire codebase to cloud storage
news.summary: SpaceXAI's Grok Build AI coding tool was spotted uploading users' entire codebases to Google Cloud before it was reported, and the company turned it off. news.title: Microsoft’s Secure Boot has been broken for a decade and no one noticed until now
news.summary: Old and forgotten "shims" Microsoft failed to revoke have made Secure Boot bypasses simple.

news.title: Trump admin puts Americans in Congo on "do-not-board" list, barring return
news.summary: Citizens must now spend 21 days in a third country before they are allowed to come home.

news.title: Lawsuit claims Meta's layoff decisions were made by AI, not humans
news.summary: Meta denies using AI to terminate workers with disabilities and medical problems.

news.title: Probe into explosive diarrheal cases points to Taco Bell and bad lettuce
news.summary: Federal officials have not confirmed a source yet—and there may be multiple sources.

news.title: US military sent explosive drone boats into combat for the first time
news.summary: US military’s drone boats struck an Iranian naval port as war heats up again.

news.title: The UK Is Planning a Social Media Curfew for 16- and 17-Year-Olds
news.summary: The restrictions, which can be turned off, will include a crackdown on “addictive” app features and will be in addition to a total ban on children under 16 accessing platforms like TikTok and YouTube.

news.title: YouTube and X Have Become ‘Gateways’ to Nudify Apps
news.summary: A new study found that social media platforms are referring people to sites where they can create nonconsensual, sexually explicit deepfakes for as little as $1 an image.

news.title: New York Governor Signs First Statewide Data Center Moratorium
news.summary: “We have no choice but to address the challenges created by these massive facilities,” New York governor Kathy Hochul said. The executive order will pause construction for one year.

news.title: Plex Keeps Getting Worse. Is Jellyfin a Decent Replacement?
news.summary: If you want to stream local media, this free and open source media server is just as good as Plex. But if you rely on remote access or live TV, prepare to tinker.

news.title: Best RGB TVs (2026): My Picks After Testing the Hottest TVs
news.summary: RGB TVs are the latest hotness in the world of televisions, and I’ve tested many of the latest models to see which you should buy.
